prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild workshop, Kaelen Forgeheart in a rolled-sleeve apron with ash-stained gloves holds a glowing, vibrating beast core with iron tongs on a workbench. Yuna Dawncrest, wearing layered blue robes, steps in and hovers his hands over the core, casting a stabilizing spell as blue magical energy begins to swirl around the object. High quality anime style, cozy workshop lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot, the beast core's violent red glow fades to a steady, manageable blue. Kaelen uses a small smithing hammer to gently tap a cooling rune into the core's casing while Yuna maintains the magical field with focused precision. Both characters share a look of relief as the core stabilizes. Consistent characters, camera, and workshop environment, no text, no watermark.
